data.title: XMRWallet integrates full Tor Network, offering users access through dedicated .onion address.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, XMRWallet, a prominent online platform for managing Monero (XMR), revealed the completion of integrating comprehensive Tor Network support into its system. This enhancement enables users to reach their digital assets using a specialized .onion address.

data.title: Legacy PKI poses risk to digital identities, 56% of orgs faced service disruptions.CyberArk report: 2,000 IT experts share perspectives on PKI security.
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) revealed the results of a recent study titled "Trends in PKI Security: A Global Study of Trends, Challenges & Business Impact." The research, conducted by Ponemon Institute, surveyed close to 2,000 IT and security professionals worldwide. The report provides insights into the current status of public key infrastructure (PKI) security. It sheds light on significant trends, challenges, and the business impact of PKI security according to the respondents.

data.title: Gallery Media Group revives Gallery Club House for Big Game 2026, hosted by Chanen & Juwan Johnson with LUMIFY®.
data.description: Chanen and Juwan Johnson will be hosting the return of the content-forward cultural hub, in partnership with LUMIFY® Redness Reliever Eye Drops, for the Big Game 2026. The event is organized by Gallery Media Group (GMG), known for brands like Coveteur and PureWow. Scheduled for January 21, 2026, in New York, the hub is set to feature various lifestyle content, with GMG being a prominent player in the industry. The event aims to provide a platform for cultural conversations and will bring together a wide range of influential figures and brands.

data.title: Fiserv partners with Sumitomo Mitsui to launch Clover in Japan, benefiting millions of SMBs. #DigitalCommerce.
data.description: In Milwaukee, Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISV), a top global provider of payments and financial services technology, has unveiled a strategic collaboration with Sumitomo Mitsui Card Company, Limited (SMCC) to introduce Fiserv’s Clover® suite in Japan. This partnership aims to offer an integrated payments and business management platform to numerous SMBs in retail, food & beverage, and professional services sectors in the country. The move is set to drive digital transformation and enhance operational efficiency for millions of small businesses in Japan.

data.title: Serbia partners with Archer for electric air taxis - can buy up to 25 eVTOLs, aims to lead European adoption.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) revealed a crucial partnership with the Government of the Republic of Serbia to propel the advancement of electric air taxis throughout Europe. Serbia has designated Archer as its favored eVTOL partner and has the opportunity to acquire an initial fleet of Midnight aircraft. The agreement outlines the potential purchase of up to 25 aircraft, aligning with relevant laws and regulations.

data.title: CasaPerks, a rent rewards platform, ends record year with acquisition and revenue growth of 10x.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CasaPerks, a leading rent rewards platform, ended a successful year with an acquisition and an impressive tenfold increase in revenue.

data.title: Lemonade introduces Autonomous Car insurance for Tesla FSD, cutting rates by 50%. NYSE: LMND leads digital insurance tech.
data.description: In New York, Lemonade (NYSE: LMND), a digital insurance company utilizing AI and emphasizing social impact, unveiled Lemonade Autonomous Car insurance. This innovative product is tailored for self-driving cars, initially focusing on Tesla FSD. The launch introduces a groundbreaking feature that slashes per-mile rates for FSD-driven journeys by around 50%, aligning with data indicating notably diminished risk levels during autonomous operation. Lemonade anticipates additional rate decreases as Tesla iterates its technology.

data.title: Mark Relph of AWS joins Qlik AI Council. Strengthening collaboration for AI initiatives.
data.description: A recent announcement from Qlik revealed that Mark Relph, previously a Director at Amazon Web Services, has now joined the Qlik AI Council. This move signifies a strategic addition to the council as Relph brings a wealth of experience from his tenure at AWS. The Qlik AI Council focuses on driving advancements and innovation in artificial intelligence within the organization. This development underscores the growing importance of AI in business strategies.

data.title: OSI Systems to hold Q2 conference call on Jan 29, 2026 at 1:30pm PT to discuss results for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025. Webcast available at www.osi-systems.com. Replay available until Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: OSI Systems, Inc. will host its quarterly conference call on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 1:30 pm Pacific Time to review its performance for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The call will be broadcasted via webcast on the company's website, and a replay will be accessible from 3:00 pm PT on January 29, 2026, until February 12, 2026. Investors can access the replay by visiting the investor relations section of the website. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol OSIS.

data.title: One to One Health receives $12M investment from Frist Cressey Ventures to enhance AI-enabled primary care services.
data.description: A company called One to One Health in Chattanooga, Tennessee, has received a $12 million minority growth investment from Frist Cressey Ventures. This investment aims to help meet the increasing demand for the company's onsite and virtual primary care solutions across the country. The funding will also aid in further enhancing their Intelligent Care Manager, an AI-powered clinical platform that provides immediate clinical insights to healthcare providers during patient care.

data.title: Uniti Group Inc. to offer $500 million 8.625% senior notes due 2032, guaranteed by Company and subsidiaries.
data.description: Little Rock, Arkansas - On January 21, 2026, Uniti Group Inc. (Nasdaq: UNIT) disclosed the launch of an offering by its subsidiaries - Uniti Services LLC, Uniti Fiber Holdings Inc., Uniti Group Finance 2019 Inc., and CSL Capital, LLC (together known as the “Issuers”) - of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 8.625% senior notes due 2032 (the “Notes”). The issuance is subject to market conditions. The Notes will be backed on a senior unsecured basis by the Company, Uniti Group LLC, Uniti Services’ immediate parent, and certain restricted subsidiaries of Uniti Services. These restricted subsidiaries include those who guarantee indebtedness under senior secured credit facilities and existing notes, excluding regulated subsidiaries that need regulatory approval before guaranteeing the Notes.

data.title: People's Daily released documentary "Amicable Neighborhood" shows cross-border stories in China. Featuring families in Heihe & Horgos.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Heihe, located in Heilongjiang Province, Dong Desheng and Natasha, a Russian baker, showcase the unique bond between their families who migrated from Russia four generations ago. Across the border in Horgos, situated in Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, Yu Huan observes another story unfolding. These individuals offer a glimpse into the cultural exchanges and connections that transcend borders, highlighting the deep-rooted ties between China and Russia that continue to thrive in these regions.

data.title: ansrsource wins bronze in 2025 Brandon Hall Group Excellence in Technology Awards for ansrTMS platform.
data.description: A technology company based in Austin, Texas called ansrsource has achieved recognition by winning the bronze award in the Brandon Hall Group's Excellence in Technology Awards. The award was specifically for their Automated Training Scheduling Platform called ansrTMS. This platform was recently launched and has been well-received in the corporate learning sector. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to innovation and providing effective solutions for training needs.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ether ETFs experience large withdrawals amid rising institutional apprehension. Global pressures impact markets; US-EU trade tensions and Japanese bond sell-offs contribute.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets experience a drop in value as global economic pressures escalate. Trade tensions between the US and EU, along with Japanese bond sell-offs, are contributing to institutional uncertainty. This has led to a decrease in cryptocurrency prices across the board. Investors are exercising caution in the face of these external factors, with the market experiencing a significant dip in response.

data.title: Zephyr's Forte Wall Custom Range Hood wins 2025 GOOD DESIGN® Award for kitchen innovation.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 21, 2026, Zephyr revealed that their Forte Wall Custom Range Hood had received the esteemed 2025 GOOD DESIGN® Award. Zephyr, known for revolutionizing kitchen spaces through innovative design and top-notch customer service, celebrated this achievement, recognizing it as a significant honor in the industry. This recognition solidifies the Forte Wall Custom Range Hood as a standout product in the market, showcasing the company's commitment to excellence.

data.title: Mars tops Glassdoor's employee choice awards, ranked #1 and #6, named best place to work in Manufacturing and Energy.
data.description: Mars has secured the top position on Glassdoor's list of Best Places to Work in Manufacturing and Energy, as well as the sixth spot on another Employees' Choice Awards list. These rankings were determined by employee feedback.
